PoolEntryData.poolTimeSeries: query GetPoolTimeSeries($id: ID!, $startDate: Int!, $first: Int!) { poolDayDatas(first: $first, orderBy: date, orderDirection: asc, where: { pool: $id, date_gt: $startDate }) { date tvlUSD volumeUSD feesUSD token0Price token1Price sqrtPrice txCount open high low close pool { liquidityProviderCount txCount collectedFeesUSD } } }
